summary: A recorded Fox News segment, posted by ICE. It opens on footage attributed to Fairfax County PD of a young man in a Raiders jersey being held by two uniformed police officers outdoors by an apartment building, then cuts to a split-screen studio interview with a female anchor at left and a male guest joining by video at right in front of a city skyline. A red lower-third chyron reads 'ILLEGAL RELEASED FROM JAIL SUSPECTED IN VA MURDER' with a 'FOX NEWS ALERT' banner and a 'TRUMP MAKES ANNOUNCEMENT TODAY 4:30PM ET' box. The narration concerns ICE detainers and a Fairfax County release. The audio is broadcast interview speech.

script.scene: Footage labeled 'FAIRFAX COUNTY PD': a young man in a Raiders jersey held by two uniformed officers outside an apartment building; chyron 'ILLEGAL RELEASED FROM JAIL SUSPECTED IN VA MURDER'; FOX NEWS ALERT banner.
Split-screen studio interview: a female anchor at left, a male guest by video at right before a city skyline; same chyron and alert banner.
The interview continues in the same split-screen layout.

notable_text: FAIRFAX COUNTY PD; ILLEGAL RELEASED FROM JAIL SUSPECTED IN VA MURDER; FOX NEWS ALERT; TRUMP MAKES ANNOUNCEMENT TODAY 4:30PM ET
